languages.text: {n}Яруб с живым любопытством поднимает на вас взгляд, глядя с некоторым недоверием.{/n} "Очень интересно узнать, как такой, как я, может быть полезным Вашему Благородию".
{n}Jarub lifts his gaze to you with lively curiosity, as well as some distrust.{/n} "I'd be very interested to hear how someone like me can be of use to my {mf|lord|lady}."
languages.original_text: {n}Яруб с живым любопытством поднимает на вас взгляд, глядя с некоторым недоверием.{/n} "Очень интересно узнать, как такой, как я, может быть полезным Вашему Благородию".

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub lifts his gaze to you with lively curiosity, as well as some distrust.{/n} "I'd be very interested to hear how someone like me can be of use to my {mf|lord|lady}."
{n}Jarub lifts his gaze to you with lively curiosity, as well as some distrust.{/n} "I'd be very interested to hear how someone like me can be of use to my {mf|lord|lady}."
{n}Jarub lifts his gaze to you with lively curiosity, as well as some distrust.{/n} "I'd be very interested to hear how someone like me can be of use to my {mf|lord|lady}."

languages.text: {n}雅鲁布抬起头望着你，眼中带着几分好奇，以及一些戒备。{/n}“我确实很想知道，像我这种人能帮上您什么忙，大人。”
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lifts his gaze to you with lively curiosity, as well as some distrust.{/n} "I'd be very interested to hear how someone like me can be of use to my {mf|lord|lady}."

traits.locale_text: {n}雅鲁布抬起头望着你，眼中带着几分好奇，以及一些戒备。{/n}“我确实很想知道，像我这种人能帮上您什么忙，大人。”

languages.text: {n}Jarub lève les yeux vers vous, le regard empreint d'une vive curiosité mêlée à une certaine méfiance.{/n} « J'aimerais beaucoup savoir comment quelqu'un comme moi peut vous être utile, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. »
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lifts his gaze to you with lively curiosity, as well as some distrust.{/n} "I'd be very interested to hear how someone like me can be of use to my {mf|lord|lady}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub lève les yeux vers vous, le regard empreint d'une vive curiosité mêlée à une certaine méfiance.{/n} « J'aimerais beaucoup savoir comment quelqu'un comme moi peut vous être utile, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. »

languages.text: {n}Jarub, canlı bir merakla ve aynı zamanda güvensizlikle bakışlarını sana çeviriyor.{/n} "Benim gibi birinin {mf|lorduma|leydime} nasıl faydası dokunabileceğini duymayı çok isterim."
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lifts his gaze to you with lively curiosity, as well as some distrust.{/n} "I'd be very interested to hear how someone like me can be of use to my {mf|lord|lady}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub, canlı bir merakla ve aynı zamanda güvensizlikle bakışlarını sana çeviriyor.{/n} "Benim gibi birinin {mf|lorduma|leydime} nasıl faydası dokunabileceğini duymayı çok isterim."

languages.text: {n}Jarub levanta la mirada hacia ti con una curiosidad animada, acompañada de desconfianza.{/n} «Estaría muy interesado en saber cómo alguien como yo puede resultarle útil a mi {mf|señor|señora}».
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lifts his gaze to you with lively curiosity, as well as some distrust.{/n} "I'd be very interested to hear how someone like me can be of use to my {mf|lord|lady}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub levanta la mirada hacia ti con una curiosidad animada, acompañada de desconfianza.{/n} «Estaría muy interesado en saber cómo alguien como yo puede resultarle útil a mi {mf|señor|señora}».

languages.text: {n}Jarub richtet seinen Blick mit einer Kombination aus Neugier und einem Hauch Misstrauen auf dich.{/n} "Ich würde sehr gerne hören, wie jemand wie ich {mf|Mylord|Mylady} helfen kann."
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lifts his gaze to you with lively curiosity, as well as some distrust.{/n} "I'd be very interested to hear how someone like me can be of use to my {mf|lord|lady}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub richtet seinen Blick mit einer Kombination aus Neugier und einem Hauch Misstrauen auf dich.{/n} "Ich würde sehr gerne hören, wie jemand wie ich {mf|Mylord|Mylady} helfen kann."

languages.text: {n}ジャラブは活発な好奇心と、少しの不信感を持ってあなたの顔を見上げた。{/n}「私のような者が、{mf|閣下|閣下}のために役立つ方法を聞きたいわ」
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lifts his gaze to you with lively curiosity, as well as some distrust.{/n} "I'd be very interested to hear how someone like me can be of use to my {mf|lord|lady}."

traits.locale_text: {n}ジャラブは活発な好奇心と、少しの不信感を持ってあなたの顔を見上げた。{/n}「私のような者が、{mf|閣下|閣下}のために役立つ方法を聞きたいわ」
